l.function: (L) Cancel the ticket and clear the screen.

q.function: Only for Cash 3 and Play 4. Type the play followed by q (e.g., 123q) to generate all combinations of the number.

dot.function: (Dot) only for Directo, Palé and Tripleta. Type the play followed by a dot (e.g., 1234.) to generate all combinations of the number.

d.function: Only for Directo. Enter an initial play of two equal digits followed by the letter d and then two equal digits for the final play (e.g., 33d66) to generate a sequence of equal pairs from the initial to the final play.

minus10.function: Only for Cash 3. Enter a three-digit play followed by -10 (e.g., 123-10) to generate all combinations containing the last two digits, increasing each value by 100.

plusXyz.function: Only for Cash 3 Straight. Enter a three-digit play followed by the + sign and another three-digit play (e.g., 345+348) to generate a straight sequence: 345, 346, 347.

directo.title: To play Directo
steps: Enter a two-digit number in the play and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

pale.title: To play Pale
steps: Enter a four-digit number in the play and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

tripleta.title: To play Tripleta
steps: Enter a six-digit number in the play and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

cash3Straight.title: To play Cash3 Straight
steps: Enter a three-digit number in the play and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

cash3Box.title: To play Cash3 Box
steps: Enter a three-digit number in the play followed by the + sign (e.g., 123+) and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

play4Straight.title: To play Play4 Straight
steps: Enter a four-digit number in the play followed by the - sign (e.g., 1234-) and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

play4Box.title: To play Play4 Box
steps: Enter a four-digit number in the play followed by the + sign (e.g., 1234+) and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

superPale.title: To play Super Pale
steps: Enter a four-digit number in the play and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

bolita.title: To play Bolita
steps: Enter a two-digit number in the play followed by the + sign, followed by the range (1 or 2) (e.g., 12+1) and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

singulacion.title: To play Singulación
steps: Enter a single-digit number in the play followed by the - sign, followed by the range (1, 2 or 3) (e.g., 1-2) and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

pick5Straight.title: To play Pick5 Straight
steps: Enter a five-digit number in the play followed by the - sign (e.g., 12345-) and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

pick5Box.title: To play Pick5 Box
steps: Enter a five-digit number in the play followed by the + sign (e.g., 12345+) and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

pickTwo.title: To play Pick Two
steps: Enter a two-digit number in the play and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

cash3FrontStraight.title: To play Cash3 Front Straight
steps: Enter a three-digit number in the play followed by the letter F and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

cash3FrontBox.title: To play Cash3 Front Box
steps: Enter a three-digit number in the play followed by the letter F and the + sign (e.g., 123F+) and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

cash3BackStraight.title: To play Cash3 Back Straight
steps: Enter a three-digit number in the play followed by the letter B and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

cash3BackBox.title: To play Cash3 Back Box
steps: Enter a three-digit number in the play followed by the letter B and the + sign (e.g., 123B+) and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

pickTwoFront.title: To play Pick Two Front
steps: Enter a two-digit number in the play, the letter F and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

pickTwoBack.title: To play Pick Two Back
steps: Enter a two-digit number in the play, the letter B and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

pickTwoMiddle.title: To play Pick Two Middle
steps: Enter a two-digit number in the play followed by the - sign and the range (3) (e.g., 10-3) and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.

panama.title: To play Panamá
steps: Enter a four-digit number in the play followed by the - sign (e.g., 1234-) and press enter.
Enter the amount and press enter.
